issues.description: Action should be 'TrashFromPlay' (trashing this Character from board), not 'TrashFromHand'. The card is activated as a Character in play.
Filter should target 'this Character' (excludeSelf:true is incorrect logic here). The activation cost is to trash THIS Character, not another one.
Target should be 'ChooseOwnBlackCharacter' or similar—must filter for black Characters. Current scope is too broad.
Duration should be 'DuringOpponentTurn' (until end of opponent's next turn), not 'EndOfTurn'. Text states 'until the end of your opponent's next turn'—violation of duration rules.
